entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for resistance to Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A serious biotic restraint affecting pigeonpea in the Indian subcontinent

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographic region where Sterility Mosaic Disease is prevalent

entities.name: ACARICIDES
entities.description: Chemicals used for disease control, noted as not economical or sustainable

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ideal strategy for managing Sterility Mosaic Disease

entities.name: PRELIMINARY SCREENING
entities.description: Initial process used to select 21 pigeonpea genotypes showing moderate resistance

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT TESTING
entities.description: Assessment of genotypes across different locations and seasons to reveal stable resistance

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The agricultural season during which the multi-environment testing was conducted

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to partition variation between genotype and environment

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors affecting disease incidence

entities.name: SMD INCIDENCE
entities.description: The measure of the occurrence of Sterility Mosaic Disease in the tested genotypes

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor that showed a high negative correlation with SMD incidence

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental factor that showed a positive correlation with SMD incidence

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF PRINCIPAL COMPONENTS
entities.description: Statistical method used to explain total variation and identify stable resistant genotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing physical traits to identify stable resistance sources

entities.name: BREEDING TRIALS
entities.description: Process for incorporating resistant genotypes for further release in pigeonpea
